vocab.meaning: các nền tảng thương mại điện tử
vocab.example: I frequently browse various e-commerce platforms to compare prices and hunt for the best deals on tech gadgets.
As a student, I often access digital databases to read scholarly journals for my research papers.

vocab.meaning: các trang web tổng hợp tin tức
vocab.example: I rely on news aggregators to get a curated overview of global events from multiple reputable sources.

vocab.meaning: giao diện thân thiện với người dùng
vocab.example: I tend to gravitate towards websites that boast a user-friendly interface and seamless navigation.

vocab.meaning: nội dung đa phương tiện (video, ảnh, âm thanh...)
vocab.example: Educational sites that incorporate rich multimedia content make the learning process much more engaging for me.

vocab.meaning: các dịch vụ phát trực tuyến
vocab.example: In my leisure time, I’m often glued to streaming services to catch up on the latest cinematic releases.

vocab.meaning: các cộng đồng dựa trên diễn đàn
vocab.example: I frequently participate in forum-based communities to exchange niche hobbies and troubleshoot technical issues.

vocab.meaning: các nguồn uy tín/đáng tin cậy
vocab.example: When I need to verify facts, I make a point of only visiting websites that are considered reputable sources.

vocab.meaning: các kho lưu trữ mã nguồn mở
vocab.example: As a developer, I spend a significant portion of my day on open-source repositories to collaborate on coding projects.

vocab.meaning: các trang web hồ sơ năng lực/trưng bày sản phẩm
vocab.example: I love visiting portfolio websites of digital artists to draw inspiration for my own creative endeavors.
